2605.19329.title: RE-VLM: Event-Augmented Vision-Language Model for Scene Understanding
2605.19329.paper_summary: Conventional vision-language models (VLMs) struggle to interpret scenes captured under adverse conditions (e.g., low light, high dynamic range, or fast motion) because standard RGB images degrade in such environments. Event cameras provide a complementary modality: they asynchronously record per-pixel brightness changes with high temporal resolution and wide dynamic range, preserving motion cues where frames fail. We propose RE-VLM, the first dual-stream vision-language model that jointly leverages RGB images and event streams for robust scene understanding across both normal and challenging conditions. RE-VLM employs parallel RGB and event encoders together with a progressive training strategy that aligns heterogeneous visual features with language. To address the scarcity of RGB-Event-Text supervision, we further propose a graph-driven pipeline that converts synchronized RGB-Event streams into verifiable scene graphs, from which we synthesize captions and question-answer (QA) pairs. To develop and evaluate RE-VLM, we construct two datasets: PEOD-Chat, targeting illumination-challenged scenes, and RGBE-Chat, covering diverse scenarios. On captioning and VQA benchmarks, RE-VLM consistently outperforms state-of-the-art RGB-only and event-only models with comparable parameter counts, with particularly large gains under challenging conditions. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of event-augmented VLMs in achieving robust vision-language understanding across a wide range of real-world environments. Code and datasets are available at https://github.com/bupt-ai-cz/RE-VLM.
2605.19329.paper_summary_zh: 傳統的視覺-語言模型（VLMs）在解釋在不利條件下捕捉的場景（例如，低光、寬動態範圍或快速運動）時面臨挑戰，因為標準的RGB圖像在這些環境中會退化。事件相機提供了一種補充的模式：它們以高時間解析度和寬動態範圍異步記錄每個像素的亮度變化，保留了在幀失敗時的運動線索。我們提出了RE-VLM，第一個雙流視覺-語言模型，聯合利用RGB圖像和事件流，以實現對正常和挑戰性條件下的穩健場景理解。RE-VLM使用並行的RGB和事件編碼器，以及一種漸進式訓練策略，將異質視覺特徵與語言對齊。為了解決RGB-事件-文本監督的稀缺性，我們進一步提出了一個基於圖的管道，將同步的RGB-事件流轉換為可驗證的場景圖，從中合成標題和問題-答案（QA）對。為了開發和評估RE-VLM，我們構建了兩個數據集：PEOD-Chat，針對照明挑戰場景，以及RGBE-Chat，涵蓋多樣的場景。在標題生成和VQA基準上，RE-VLM在可比參數數量下始終優於最先進的僅RGB和僅事件模型，尤其在挑戰性條件下獲得了特別大的增益。這些結果展示了增強事件的VLM在實現廣泛真實世界環境中的穩健視覺-語言理解方面的有效性。代碼和數據集可在https://github.com/bupt-ai-cz/RE-VLM上獲得。
2605.19329.author: Hanqing Liu et.al.
2605.19329.authors: Hanqing Liu, Mingjie Liu, Luoping Cui, Endian Lin, Donghong Jiang, Chuang Zhu
